name: Fiji Hindi
notes: Fiji Hindi, an Awadhi/Bhojpuri-derived Indo-Aryan koine of Fiji. STUB: the grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified. Written both in Devanagari (abugida, inherent vowel /ə/, schwa deletion) and in a non-standardised Latin orthography; neither map is claimed here. A Devanagari map (as for Hindi) or an explicit Latin-romanisation contract would be required as input.
